### Correctness

- Polars: pass (32/32)
- Booster: pass (32/32)


## Single-Key `std` Evidence

`std` scale on the Rust-first path because each worker accumulates mergeable `(count, mean, m2)` state and Rayon only merges those partial states at the end.
When the dataset is smaller or the group count is low, the fixed overhead from NumPy contiguity/copy work, the Python↔Rust boundary, and Series materialization eats into that gain even though the kernel itself remains parallel.

| Workload | Agg | Sort | Backend | Execution | Cold | Warm |
|----------|-----|------|---------|-----------|------|------|
| standard | `std` | True | pandas | `pandas.groupby.std` | 25.87 ± 1.43 (24.29..29.43) | 24.13 ± 5.86 (21.16..48.51) |
| standard | `std` | True | polars | `polars.group_by.agg(std)` | 18.51 ± 1.36 (17.21..22.45) | 16.10 ± 0.72 (15.31..17.49) |
| standard | `std` | True | booster | `booster->rust.groupby_std_f64_sorted` | 4.39 ± 0.98 (3.25..6.79) | 3.05 ± 0.32 (2.62..4.01) |
| standard | `std` | False | pandas | `pandas.groupby.std` | 25.47 ± 1.91 (22.90..30.48) | 23.23 ± 1.27 (19.88..26.39) |
| standard | `std` | False | polars | `polars.group_by.agg(std)` | 20.06 ± 1.53 (18.06..25.00) | 17.93 ± 1.28 (16.26..20.88) |
| standard | `std` | False | booster | `booster->rust.groupby_std_f64_firstseen_u32` | 4.57 ± 0.65 (3.79..6.01) | 3.29 ± 0.40 (2.90..4.41) |
| high | `std` | True | pandas | `pandas.groupby.std` | 788.90 ± 55.95 (754.27..986.10) | 780.05 ± 38.64 (752.31..896.37) |
| high | `std` | True | polars | `polars.group_by.agg(std)` | 146.62 ± 18.17 (134.53..215.73) | 141.72 ± 7.97 (129.87..159.35) |
| high | `std` | True | booster | `booster->rust.groupby_std_f64_sorted` | 151.41 ± 20.40 (138.77..231.47) | 144.04 ± 14.14 (132.30..192.44) |
| high | `std` | False | pandas | `pandas.groupby.std` | 301.30 ± 27.08 (261.51..391.83) | 291.74 ± 39.96 (234.50..422.66) |
| high | `std` | False | polars | `polars.group_by.agg(std)` | 183.87 ± 4.54 (174.70..194.90) | 225.48 ± 29.87 (180.41..299.33) |
| high | `std` | False | booster | `booster->rust.groupby_std_f64_firstseen_u32` | 105.93 ± 19.02 (93.92..179.48) | 80.66 ± 2.85 (77.61..87.57) |

### Booster conversion vs compute breakdown

The table below isolates the Rust-first Booster path for the same single-key datasets. `local_build`, `merge`, `reorder`, and `materialize` come from the internal Rust profiling hook, while the Python-side phases measure post-kernel normalization and final pandas Series assembly.

| Workload | Agg | Sort | Execution | Prepare inputs | Local build | Merge | Reorder | Materialize | Python normalize | Series build | Rust total | Total pipeline | Partial groups | Final groups | Partial/final |
|----------|-----|------|-----------|----------------|-------------|-------|---------|-------------|------------------|--------------|------------|----------------|----------------|--------------|---------------|
| standard | `std` | True | `booster->rust.groupby_std_f64_sorted` | 0.00 ± 0.00 (0.00..0.01) | 2.67 ± 0.29 (2.26..3.63) | 0.21 ± 0.04 (0.16..0.31) | 0.01 ± 0.00 (0.01..0.02) | 0.01 ± 0.01 (0.00..0.03) | 0.00 ± 0.00 (0.00..0.00) | 0.06 ± 0.04 (0.04..0.22) | 2.90 ± 0.29 (2.44..3.89) | 3.18 ± 0.65 (2.70..5.85) | 39,000 | 1,000 | 39.000 |
| standard | `std` | False | `booster->rust.groupby_std_f64_firstseen_u32` | 0.00 ± 0.00 (0.00..0.01) | 2.70 ± 0.30 (2.37..3.46) | 0.21 ± 0.03 (0.17..0.26) | 0.01 ± 0.00 (0.01..0.02) | 0.01 ± 0.00 (0.00..0.02) | 0.00 ± 0.00 (0.00..0.01) | 0.05 ± 0.02 (0.03..0.13) | 2.93 ± 0.30 (2.63..3.75) | 3.17 ± 0.48 (2.79..4.94) | 39,000 | 1,000 | 39.000 |
| high | `std` | True | `booster->rust.groupby_std_f64_sorted` | 0.01 ± 0.00 (0.00..0.02) | 47.95 ± 15.70 (34.89..86.49) | 0.00 ± 0.00 (0.00..0.00) | 112.83 ± 34.30 (88.40..219.49) | 14.31 ± 3.78 (11.71..29.24) | 0.01 ± 0.00 (0.00..0.02) | 0.13 ± 0.06 (0.09..0.30) | 175.09 ± 48.32 (136.98..307.66) | 175.66 ± 48.45 (137.42..308.14) | 3,160,983 | 3,160,983 | 1.000 |
| high | `std` | False | `booster->rust.groupby_std_f64_firstseen_u32` | 0.01 ± 0.00 (0.01..0.01) | 38.76 ± 2.02 (36.09..42.79) | 0.00 ± 0.00 (0.00..0.00) | 29.74 ± 1.77 (27.73..34.79) | 12.35 ± 0.83 (11.82..15.67) | 0.01 ± 0.00 (0.00..0.01) | 0.12 ± 0.05 (0.09..0.26) | 80.85 ± 3.67 (76.18..91.04) | 81.32 ± 3.69 (76.63..91.69) | 3,160,983 | 3,160,983 | 1.000 |
